titleStmt.title: SII 26.480: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 480. (A.R. No. 457 of 1909.) ŚUTTAMALLI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the central shrine in the same temple.
This inscription contains a praśasti of the king commencing with Pūtalamaḍaṇdai Pugaḻuḍaṉ poliya, etc., and mentions the queen Ulagamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records an order of the king, executed by Kōnērimaikoṇḍāṉ, addressed to the dēvakaṉmi and the Śrīmāhēśvarakkaṇkāṇi of the temple of the god Bagavatiyīśvaramuḍaiyār at Śuttamalli alias Vīraviṉōdach-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam in Mēl-Vēmba-nāḍu, granting land in the western quarter of Śēravaṉmādēvichchaturvvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu to provide for worship and offerings to the above-mentioned god.
A certain Kāṅgaṉ alias Tirumuḍiśūṭṭi of Kadamaiṟ Koḍumaḷūr alias Uttamapāṇḍyanallūr figures as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūtalamaṭantai pukaḻuṭaṉ poli
ya vetamun tamiḻu melmaiyil viḷaṅka kaṟ
puṭait tirumakaḷ poṟpuyat tiruppa tikkirunāṉkuñ
cakkaravāḻamu cūḻum puvaṉameḻuṅkavitta veṇkuṭai niḻa
ṟ ceṅkoṉaṭappa nāṭoṟu matiyamum nāyaṟum valaṅ
koḷ Āṭakap poruppilaraicu miniruppac cu
n=taramār viḻintaraṉ pūṭṭiya Āramum Alaṅkalum
Aḻakuṭaṉ tikaḷa viṉaiyum puliyum villuñ curam
puka Āṉaimaṉṉavaraṭimalar cūṭa marapil vanta maṇimuṭicūṭi vi
ḷaṅkiya katirmaṇi virasiṅhāsaṉattu Ulakamuḻuṭaiyāḷo
ṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkoccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakka
ravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaradevarku yāṇṭu 2 vatu prasādañ cetaru
ḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi koṉerimaikoṇṭāṉ melvempanāṭṭu
cutta malliyāṉa viraviṉotaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu pakavatiyiśva
ramuṭaiyār koyililt tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇ
kāṇiceyvāṉukkum sivabrāhmaṇaṟkum Ittevaṟkut tiru
ppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka muḷḷi
nāṭṭuc ceravaṉmāteviccaturvvetimaṅkalattu melpiṭākai
ku kkaḷa pala kār pacāṉa viḷaiyu nilattile virapāṇṭiyaṉ ko
Iraṇṭāvatu pacāṉamutal Antarāyam kaṭamai
tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāka Ippaṭikku nam variyilāreḻuttiṭṭa
Uḷvari taraccoṉṉom Uḷvarippaṭiyuḷḷa nilaṅ kaikkoṇṭu ka
ṭamaiṟ koṭumuḷurāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiyanallūr
kāṅkaṉāṉa tirumuṭicūṭṭiṉāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.480 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
